emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Belleek Castle & Thatch Bar website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 43/100
========================================

9 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- No SSL
 HIGH
--------------------
- No mobile support
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 20+ inline styles
 HIGH
--------------------
- Broken menu page
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No meta tags
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No analytics
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Images oversized
 HIGH
--------------------
- No contact form
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No footer


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.label: No SSL
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: No mobile support
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: 20+ inline styles
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: Broken menu page
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: No meta tags
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Without analytics, you can't track traffic sources, popular pages, or conversion rates.
issues.label: No analytics
issues.check: Install the Tag Assistant extension and check if GA or similar is detected.
issues.siteHint: You can't improve what you don't measure.

issues.label: Images oversized
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Without a contact form, visitors must compose their own email - some won't bother.
issues.label: No contact form
issues.check: Scroll the page. Do you see a Name/Email/Message form? If only an email link, there's no form.
issues.siteHint: Contact forms typically boost inbound leads by 30-50%.

issues.label: No footer
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.
